title: Michael: The Great Adventure!
description: A Mod that I made for sh*ts and gigs.
body:
This is a mod i made for sh*ts and gigs.

Content:
========

Items:
------

*   BigMac Sword
*   BigMac Pickaxe
*   BigMac Axe
*   BigMac Shovel
*   BigMac Hoe
*   Michaels Special Sauce
*   Ketchup
*   BigMac
*   BigMac Bread
*   Other Stuff

Blocks:
-------

*   OtherStuff Block
*   Burger Bread Block
*   Achmed Profession Block
*   BigMac Block

Entities:
---------

*   Michael
*   Michael Endboss

Biomes / Dimensions:
--------------------

*   Michael Biome
*   Michael Dimension
*   Michael Dimension Biome

Structures:
-----------

*   McDonalds

How those features affect a user's experience:
==============================================

The BigMac Tools are crazy good.

Michael and Michael Endboss are hard to defeat.

Eating a BigMac spawns Michael
